Package net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.boundaries

package net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.boundaries
Package net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.boundaries.
  • Class
    Description
    ActiveBoundaryProviderFactory
    Factory for active-state boundary providers used by the direct two-state knock-in solver.
    AmericanOptionBachelierModelBoundary
    Boundary conditions for AmericanOption under the FDMBachelierModel.
    AmericanOptionBlackScholesModelBoundary
    Boundary condition for an AmericanOption under the FDMBlackScholesModel.
    AmericanOptionCevModelBoundary
    Boundary conditions for AmericanOption under the FDMCevModel.
    AmericanOptionHestonModelBoundary
    Boundary conditions for AmericanOption under the FDMHestonModel.
    AmericanOptionSabrModelBoundary
    Boundary conditions for AmericanOption under the FDMSabrModel.
    BachelierActiveBoundaryProvider
    Active-state outer boundary provider for the direct two-state knock-in solver under a Bachelier-type equity model.
    BarrierOptionBachelierModelBoundary
    Boundary conditions for BarrierOption under the FDMBachelierModel.

    Boundary conditions for BarrierOption under the FDMBlackScholesModel.

    Boundary conditions for BarrierOption under the FDMHestonModel.
    BarrierOptionSabrModelBoundary
    Boundary conditions for BarrierOption under the FDMSabrModel.

    Boundary conditions for BasketOption under FDMMultiAssetBlackScholesModel.

    BlackScholesActiveBoundaryProvider
    Active-state outer boundary provider for the direct two-state knock-in solver under a Black-Scholes-type equity model.
    CevActiveBoundaryProvider
    Active-state outer boundary provider for the direct two-state knock-in solver under a CEV-type equity model.

    Factory for creating FiniteDifferenceBoundary instances.
    FiniteDifferenceBoundary
    Interface for boundaries conditions provided to finite difference solvers.

    Factory interface for creating FiniteDifferenceBoundary instances associated with a given finite difference product.
